query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_recipes FROM recipes; SELECT COUNT(*) as recipes_with_image FROM recipes WHERE "imageUrl" IS NOT NULL AND "imageUrl" != ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as recipes_without_image FROM recipes WHERE "imageUrl" IS NULL OR "imageUrl" = ''; SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" IS NOT NULL AND "imageUrl" != '' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as coverage_percentage FROM recipes;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3N8WHcqSjo6gJV1.8cb8a16f7acb --database ndjzMo7PxeapbzLjBHjsKj --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_recipes FROM recipes; SELECT COUNT(*) as recipes_with_image FROM recipes WHERE "imageUrl" IS NOT NULL AND "imageUrl" != ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as recipes_without_image FROM recipes WHERE "imageUrl" IS NULL OR "imageUrl" = ''; SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" IS NOT NULL AND "imageUrl" != '' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as coverage_percentage FROM recipes;
